how: Added SpeedDialFAB as an app-shell action-array component, exposed a MapTabStage quickActions slot, composed the map locate action from AppMapStageView, and guarded against route/history/settings/icon-library coupling with unit, source-quality, and E2E tests.
problem: Map-level quick actions did not have a governed expansion boundary, so future actions could couple directly to route, map, settings, or icon-library internals.
remainingGap: Capsule/FAB/drawer/notification z-index regression remains in TSK-016-06.
why: The seventh UI/UX architecture needs quick actions to scale through an actions array while preserving AppCapsule, BottomNav, and MapBottomSheet boundaries.
남은 gap: Capsule/FAB/drawer/notification z-index regression remains in TSK-016-06.
무슨 문제: Map-level quick actions lacked a governed extension boundary and could regress into route/history/settings/icon-library coupling.
어떻게 해결: SpeedDialFAB was added under app-shell, MapTabStage exposes only a ReactNode quickActions slot, and AppMapStageView composes the locate action without adding route/history/API/icon-library coupling.
왜 해결: Quick actions need a reusable actions-array contract before adding more global capsule/FAB behavior.
